title: MCA Invites Public Comments on Proposed Amendments to Companies (Incorporation) Rules, 2014 and Rationalization of Filing Framework
content:
# MCA Invites Public Comments on Proposed Amendments to Companies (Incorporation) Rules, 2014 and Rationalization of Filing Framework

Ek important update hai! Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) ne Companies (Incorporation) Rules, 2014 mein proposed amendments aur filing framework ke rationalization par public comments invite kiye hain.

*   **Public Notice Date:** The MCA issued a public notice on April 8, 2026, inviting suggestions from stakeholders.
*   **Proposed Amendments:** The draft "Companies (Incorporation) Amendment Rules, 2026" aim to simplify company incorporation, reduce compliance burden, and promote ease of doing business.
*   **Key Changes:** The proposed changes include consolidation of multiple forms into simplified e-forms (like E-CHNG and E-CON), rationalization of KYC and documentation requirements, and removal of redundant provisions.
*   **Rationalization of Filing Framework:** MCA, through the Indian Institute of Corporate Affairs (IICA), is also seeking stakeholder inputs on streamlining the overall filing and compliance framework under the Companies Act, 2013, covering the entire corporate lifecycle (entry, operations, and exit).
*   **Submission Deadline (Incorporation Rules):** Comments on the proposed amendments to the Companies (Incorporation) Rules, 2014, can be submitted through the MCA e-consultation portal by May 9, 2026.
*   **Submission Deadline (Filing Framework):** Comments for the rationalization of the filing/compliance framework can be submitted by May 15, 2026.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.mca.gov.in)

*Published on: 19 April 2026*
